name: @groundtruth-mcp/gt-mcp
description: Self-hosted MCP server for live docs and best practices. Context7 alternative — unlimited libraries (363+ curated + npm/PyPI/crates.io/Go fallback), no rate limits, code audit tool.

scripts.build: tsc && find dist -name '*.js.map' -delete && javascript-obfuscator dist --output dist --compact true --string-array true --string-array-encoding rc4 --string-array-threshold 0.9 --split-strings true --split-strings-chunk-length 10
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run clean && npm run build && npm run update-stats
scripts.version: node scripts/update-version.mjs && node scripts/update-changelog.mjs && npm run update-stats && git add -A
scripts.postversion: git push && git push --tags && node scripts/create-release.mjs
scripts.release: npm version minor && npm publish --access public
scripts.release:patch: npm version patch && npm publish --access public
scripts.release:major: npm version major && npm publish --access public

author: rm-rf-prod
